items.content: Create LOTM domain engine modules (judgment, combat, status-effect, attribute-calc, damage-calc, pathway)

Create tests for new LOTM modules

Fix data files + lookup + prompts (M4-M5)
Fix remaining test files, all 4 checks pass (M7)

Update 5 engine/tools/ files importing from core/memory/ or core/secrets/

Final: typecheck + lint + format + test
